overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The camera moves from an open commercial plaza with massive digital billboards into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. Wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with digital billboards

events.description: begins walking forward through the wet plaza toward the commercial building
passes by group of pedestrians wearing red shirts standing in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked plaza toward the illuminated commercial building with large digital displays

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in red shirts standing and conversing in the plaza

entered.detail: tall modern building with massive illuminated digital billboards on the facade
large array of bright digital screens displaying advertisements on the building face
rain-soaked tiled plaza floor reflecting neon lights
tall palm tree visible against the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open commercial plaza at night during light rain. The camera walks forward across wet reflective pavement toward a massive glass building covered in digital billboards. A group of pedestrians in red shirts stands in the center of the plaza as the camera passes by them, with palm trees visible to the right and sparse vehicle traffic on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with holographic advertisements

events.description: moves from open plaza into covered walkway beneath building overhang
large green holographic advertisement projection becomes prominent in the field of view

agents.ego_description: turning right to follow the covered sidewalk along the building facade, passing under the overhang

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white coat standing near the street edge looking at traffic

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow sign with black WARNING text mounted on the building
large green holographic advertisement projection beaming from the building
tall vertical digital billboard displaying HOS text and imagery
concrete overhang providing shelter from the rain
circular planter with spiky palm-like vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza into a semi-covered walkway beneath a building overhang, providing shelter from the rain. Large yellow WARNING signs and green holographic projections dominate the right side of the frame, while the camera passes a circular planter with vegetation. The sidewalk continues along the street where moderate vehicle traffic is visible, and the lighting becomes more concentrated from the neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating and dense vegetation

events.description: pedestrian density increases with multiple people carrying umbrellas entering the frame
passes closely by pedestrian with purple hair carrying a black umbrella

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd of pedestrians carrying umbrellas along the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking alongside the camera
pedestrian with red hair and light-colored umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: row of bright orange benches lining the walkway
tall cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertising screens

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered walkway where the crowd density increases with numerous pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The camera navigates through the crowd, passing orange benches on the right and a large advertising pillar. The green holographic projection and warning signs recede into the background as the camera moves deeper into the covered corridor, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, rain-soaked commercial plaza into a densely crowded, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins by walking across reflective wet pavement toward a massive glass building adorned with digital billboards, passing a group of pedestrians in red shirts and scattered palm trees. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath a building overhang, where the lighting shifts to concentrated neon glows and the view is dominated by yellow warning signs and green holographic projections. The scene then deepens into the covered corridor as the crowd density increases with numerous pedestrians carrying umbrellas, passing orange benches and advertising pillars. Finally, the camera navigates further into the sheltered walkway, leaving the holographic signs behind while the wet ground continues to mirror the vibrant city lights.
